examples.summary: Using supplied local sample evidence, 2/4 sampled rows moved reporting bucket under the supplied timezone/date-boundary replay.

validation_replay_summary.honesty_note: Replay Lite validates targeted assumptions from supplied local fixture/sample data; it is not full warehouse replay.

replay_fidelity_summary.honesty_note: Scores reflect evidence quality and replay readiness; v1.20 does not run behavioral replay.

assumption_diff_summary.note: Static assumption diffing explains old-vs-new assumed behavior; behavioral replay is not yet run.

first_finding.assumption: Timestamp-to-date logic produces stable reporting buckets across this change.
first_finding.recommended_check: Run a before/after bucket comparison by day and timezone for the affected timestamp over a recent representative window, especially midnight-boundary records.

validation_replay.summary: Using supplied local sample evidence, 2/4 sampled rows moved reporting bucket under the supplied timezone/date-boundary replay.
limitations: Uses supplied sample rows, not full production data.
validation_replay.honesty_note: Replay Lite is a targeted local assumption check from supplied fixture/sample data; it is not a full warehouse clone or production query replay.

assumption_diff.old_assumption: Timestamp-to-date bucketing remained stable across reporting boundaries.
assumption_diff.new_assumption: Timestamp/timezone/date-bucketing semantics may move records across reporting boundaries.
assumption_diff.drift_summary: Daily/hourly bucket meaning may differ before vs after this PR.
assumption_diff.evidence_excerpt: select date(event_ts) as reporting_day, sum(amount_usd) as revenue_usd, count(*) as event_count from analytics.stg_events group by 1
assumption_diff.advisory_note: Assumption diff is static PR-context evidence, not behavioral replay.
